title: PackageArchiver UnarchiveIntentSender EXTRA_INTENT system launch
notes: Code-level flaw confirmed: UnarchiveIntentSender.send() extracts EXTRA_INTENT and starts with system context, no component/permission validation, no preventIntentRedirect. However, obtaining the Binder reference is extremely difficult — it travels via implicit Intent (ACTION_UNARCHIVE_DIALOG) but system PackageInstaller has priority=1 and system apps win resolution. Implicit intent interception on Android 16 is near-impossible. Demoted from P0 to P3-research. Real vuln but no practical exploit path on current devices.
